Crown of Thorns

Triggers: 3 sec

Imminent Doom
The artifact owner throws an orb at a random enemy unit. It bounces up to 4 times and deals pure damage equal to 40% of the target's max health on impact. Enemy units hit by the orb can't recover health and gain positive effects for 4 sec, and they are also silenced. They can't use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). If an enemy unit dies within 4 sec of being hit by the orb, they can't be revived for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝
